title: pimpinella austriaca var. rubens
intro: Pimpinella austriaca var. rubens, also known as Austrian burnet or red burnet, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Pimpinella austriaca var. rubens is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
